claim_boundary: A pass calibrates dark noise and event separation only. Candidate components are not identified as cosmic rays without exposure metadata, controls, and a sustained rate/geometry study. A hardware-null is evidence of no measurement, not a failure of the classifier.
headline: CMOS calibration not run: no real dark-frame stack available

public_receipt.claim_boundary: Saved measurements can be regraded; this receipt is not a simulation rerun.

reason: No real capped-sensor dark-frame stack was configured. Set WINDOWSILL_I01_FRAMES or pass --frames; synthetic data is not accepted as an instrument measurement.
